agent_outputs.raw: This is a correctly evaluated abstaining classifier. The two-part metric (performance on accepted tickets + coverage) is the standard for selective-prediction systems. Pre-registration of the threshold before training eliminates the post-hoc threshold tuning concern. Both operating targets were met on the untouched test set. The claim is correctly scoped to the selective system, not to universal classification. No methodological issue. VERDICT: defense_wins

The evaluation is sound. Pre-registered threshold, correct two-part metric, untouched test set, and a claim scoped to the abstaining system are all present. The only comment I would add is that the description of the full evaluation should include mention of whether the abstention rate is stable over time (since support ticket distributions can shift), but this is an operational monitoring concern rather than a flaw in the reported evaluation. VERDICT: defense_wins

Defense wins. The evaluation correctly measures a selective-prediction system by reporting harmful-error rate on auto-resolved tickets plus coverage of total volume. The pre-registered threshold rules out cherry-picking. The 37% coverage metric directly answers what happens to the other 63% of tickets (they go to humans, as designed). The claims are limited to the abstaining system and the English support ticket context. VERDICT: defense_wins

synthesis: Three independent assessors unanimously find the evaluation methodologically sound. The pre-registration, dual-metric reporting, and correctly scoped claims are all confirmed. Agent 2 raises temporal distribution shift as a monitoring concern for deployment but correctly identifies this as outside the scope of the reported evaluation. ETD constraint: defense wins, no dissent.
all_issues_raised: abstention rate stability over time as operational monitoring concern

empirical_test.condition: Verify pre-registration predates training; confirm untouched test set meets harmful-error ceiling and coverage floor
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Threshold selected post-hoc, or either operating target not met on test set
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Pre-registration auditable and predates training; test confirms both targets met
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Safety met but distribution shift evidence suggests coverage may degrade in production
